landing.title: A Few Things Before you Start

list.text: Available only for existing customers with registered email and mobile number.
Keep your Debit Card / NetBanking details handy for identity verification.
Ensure your PAN is updated with the bank and your NRI account is active.
Only customers who are Re-KYC and FATCA compliant can proceed.
Both your permanent and mailing address countries should not be India.

consents.title: I agree to be being classified as a "Retail Client" as per IFSCA guidelines.
I hereby consent to collection and processing of my Data for availing this Account and relevant services in the manner described in the notice here

Optional: I hereby consent to processing of my Data for sending me personalized offers on other products and services of HDFC Bank, its affiliates and partners through Call, SMS, WhatsApp, Email or other channels in the manner described in the notice here

dateOfBirthValidation.message: This product is available for customers aged between 18 and 55 years.
